title: Claude Fable 5 plays Factorio
summary: Claude Fable 5 autonomously plays Factorio, a factory-building game, by strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. The demonstration showcases the model's ability to handle complex planning and sequential decision-making in a game environment.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 playing Factorio autonomously, strategizing and building an automated factory without human intervention. It matters as a demonstration of an AI agent handling long-horizon planning and sequential decision-making inside a complex game environment. The key takeaway: the model manages multi-step factory construction on its own, illustrating sustained planning across a game that rewards coordinated, ongoing automation.
